overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural landscape at dusk. The scene features dramatic crimson-lit skies, snow-capped mountains in the distance, and transitions from a forested trail to open grassland with a village visible on the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail surrounded by trees and bushes

entered.detail: Large mountain range with white snow visible on the peaks against the dark sky
Narrow winding dirt trail through the hillside
Low bushes and grass lining both sides of the trail
Distinctive large tree with spreading branches on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow forested trail at dusk, with Geralt walking away from the camera. A snow-capped mountain range looms in the distance to the right, while the path winds through moderate vegetation. The lighting is low with warm red tones filtering through the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside path approaching village with stone walls

events.description: village with illuminated windows becomes visible on the left hillside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens to reveal a village on the hillside

entered.detail: Cluster of buildings with warm lights glowing from windows on the left hillside
Low stone wall running alongside the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the trail widens and a village with glowing windows appears on the left hillside. The large tree and dense scrub are left behind as the path becomes more open, with a stone wall appearing on the left. The snow-capped mountains shift from the right to directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with direct mountain approach

events.description: trail opens into wide grassland with unobstructed view of the mountain range ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through expansive open fields toward the distant snow-capped mountain range

entered.detail: Expansive open field with tall grass replacing the enclosed trail
Dramatic red and purple clouds illuminated by the setting sun

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast grassland with unobstructed views of the snow-capped mountains ahead. The village lights recede into the distance on the left while dramatic crimson clouds dominate the right side of the sky. Geralt continues walking through the open terrain toward the mountain range.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow forested trail that gradually opens into a vast, crimson-lit grassland. It begins behind Geralt as he walks along a winding path under a darkening sky, with snow-capped mountains looming to the right. As he progresses, the dense vegetation and scrub give way to a widening trail where a village with glowing windows emerges on the left hillside and a stone wall appears. The scene then expands into an open terrain, shifting the perspective so the mountains move from the periphery to directly ahead. Finally, the village lights recede into the distance as the camera follows Geralt across the wide plains under a sky dominated by dramatic crimson clouds.
